If Presale Succeeds

Liquidity is created on PancakeSwap. 70% of raised BNB goes into liquidity. Remaining funds support growth, listings and ecosystem operations.

If Presale Fails

If softcap is not reached, contributors can use the refund function according to the contract rules. No unfair launch.

Tax System

Standard Buy Tax: 5%
Standard Sell Tax: 8%
Allocation depends on the active mode.

The 7 Modes

Every 24 hours, SCHIZORA shifts personality through controlled rotation. Parasite Mode is special and not part of the normal daily rotation.

CalmStability

Easier participation and softer market pressure.

BurnScarcity

More burn allocation and faster supply tightening.

RewardLoyalty

More value reserved for holder incentives.

ChaosUnpredictable

Dynamic taxes create hype and curiosity.

MirrorAdaptive

Responds to buy and sell pressure.

SilentStealth

Quiet accumulation and lower friction.

PredatorPressure

Weak exits feed the ecosystem.

Parasite ☣️Special Mode

Activates when watched external tokens collapse.

Terms & Risk Notice

No financial advice. SCHIZORA is a crypto asset project. Nothing on this website is financial, investment, legal or tax advice.

Crypto risk. Digital assets are highly volatile. You may lose part or all of your funds. Participate only if you understand the risks.

Presale rules. Minimum buy is 0.05 BNB and maximum buy is 0.50 BNB per wallet. Softcap is 5 BNB and hardcap is 20 BNB. If the presale is successful, participants claim 50% after finalization and 50% after 7 days. If the presale fails, contributors can use the refund function.

Liquidity plan. If successful, 70% of raised BNB is intended for PancakeSwap liquidity. Remaining funds support growth, listings, marketing and ecosystem operations.

Self-custody. You are responsible for your wallet, private keys, gas fees and transaction confirmations. Always verify official contract addresses before interacting.
